name: @refarm.dev/pi-agent
description: pi-agent — WASM plugin compiled from Rust via cargo-component

scripts.build:wasm: node ../../scripts/ci/cargo-run.mjs --copy wasm32-wasip1/release/pi_agent.wasm dist/pi_agent.wasm component build --target wasm32-wasip1 --release && node -e "const t=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('plugin.json','utf-8'));delete t._note;require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/plugin.json',JSON.stringify(t,null,2)+'\n');"
scripts.build: node ../../scripts/ci/cargo-run.mjs --copy wasm32-wasip1/release/pi_agent.wasm dist/pi_agent.wasm component build --target wasm32-wasip1 --release && node -e "const t=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('plugin.json','utf-8'));delete t._note;require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/plugin.json',JSON.stringify(t,null,2)+'\n');" && jco transpile dist/pi_agent.wasm --name _refarm_pi_agent --out-dir dist/jco --no-nodejs-compat --import-bindings hybrid
scripts.test:integration: echo 'No integration tests for this crate'
